productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Handbags
description: Make a style statement effortlessly with this handbag from United Colours Of benetton which is not to be left behind for short trips, road trips, nor anything in between. It celebrates a blend of branded elements and distinctly smooth aesthetics. The classy silhouette created from leather is a must have. Time to take the office by storm and be the coolest at the mall  too!Made of 100% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester on the inside for durabilityOne large zippered compartmentOne inside zippered compartment for essentials,One pouch for mobileSlightly elasticated mouth with rouched effectHigh glossy effectBrand name badge on the side Length: 46 cmWidth;  41 cmBase :  9 cmCareDo not wash, bleach, iron, dry clean or tumble dryRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
